privacy_notice: ZK-112: All leaf values in this file are SYNTHETIC test data using predictable patterns (0x01, 0x02, 0xaabb, etc.). No real user commitments or production data are included. These vectors are safe for public repository commit.
description: Cross-stack Merkle inclusion vectors for ZK-022 and ZK-024. Roots and paths are produced by LocalMerkleTree (sdk/src/merkle.ts) using SHA-256 as a stand-in for BN254 Pedersen. The same hash ordering and zero-node derivation must be reproduced by the Noir circuit helpers in circuits/lib/src/merkle/.
note: Depth-4 trees are used so vectors are compact. Production depth is 20; the structural invariants are depth-independent.

vectors.description: Empty tree — all zero leaves. Root is the depth-4 zero-node.
vectors.note: Empty-tree root is computed from LocalMerkleTree(4).getRoot(). No inclusion proof.

vectors.description: Single leaf at index 0 — sparse tree, only the left-most slot filled.
vectors.path_note: All siblings are zero nodes; the root is computed by hashing the leaf up with zero siblings at each level.

vectors.description: Two leaves at indices 0 and 1 — minimal non-trivial pair.
vectors.path_note: Sibling at level 0 is leaf[1]; siblings at levels 1-3 are zero nodes.

vectors.description: Four leaves covering both halves of the depth-4 tree.
vectors.path_note: Prove leaf[2]. Sibling at level 0 is leaf[3]; sibling at level 1 is the hash of leaf[0]+leaf[1]; levels 2-3 are zero nodes.

vectors.description: Right-most leaf at index 15 in a full depth-4 tree (16 leaves).
vectors.path_note: Rightmost leaf; all siblings come from the left subtree. Tests full-index bit decomposition.

vectors.description: Invalid path — tampered sibling at level 0 should fail inclusion.
vectors.path_note: Tampered sibling causes recomputed root to differ from stored root; inclusion must be rejected.

vectors.description: Non-zero index 7 — tests that left/right bit ordering is correct for a mid-tree index.
vectors.path_note: Index 7 = binary 0111; leaf is right child at levels 0, 1, 2 and left child at level 3.
